generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted on the motor (r_M) providing motor shaft angle."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder placed behind the gearbox (r_G) providing gearbox output angle."
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring the motor input current I_M."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction (DataTransmitted)
instance MotorEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

// C10: Data (measurement & derived)
instance MotorAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of motor angle r_M derived from MotorEncoder."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEngine
]

instance GearboxAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of gearbox angle r_G derived from GearboxEncoder."
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEngine
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of motor input current I_M."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEngine
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque τ calculated from current and angle measurements."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted, MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEngine
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity ω from successive motor angle samples."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEngine
]

instance AccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular acceleration α from successive velocity samples."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEngine
]

// Simulated data (for visualization)
instance SimulatedMotorAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated motor angle ^r_M generated by friction‑free Simulink model."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo WebDashboardApp
]

instance SimulatedGearboxAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated gearbox angle ^r_G generated by analytical friction models."
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo WebDashboardApp
]

instance SimulatedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated torque ^τ from MATLAB/Simulink friction models."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo WebDashboardApp
]

instance SimulatedVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated angular velocity ^ω from Simulink models."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo WebDashboardApp
]

// C10: Models
instance MotorSysmlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML block definition of the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysmlModelingTool
]

instance GearboxSysmlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML block definition of the cycloidal gearbox."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysmlModelingTool
]

instance RotationalFlowSysmlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML internal block diagram representing rotational flow between motor and gearbox."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysmlModelingTool
]

instance FrictionFreeSimModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink executable model of friction‑free robot dynamics."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEngine
]

instance CoulombViscousSimModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model implementing Coulomb‑Viscous friction."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEngine
]

instance StribeckSimModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model implementing the Stribeck friction characteristic."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEngine
]

instance DahlSimModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model implementing the Dahl friction model."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEngine
]

instance LuGreSimModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model implementing the LuGre friction model."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEngine
]

// C11: Enablers
instance MqttBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker used for streaming live sensor data to the digital twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables LiveDataStreamingService
]

instance MatlabSimulinkEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink execution environment for simulation, identification and model updating."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, ParameterExtractionService, ModelUpdateService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell linking model elements with runtime data."
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelUpdateService
]

instance SysmlModelingTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML tool employed to create structural block diagrams of motor and gearbox."
    DTDFVocab:enables EngineeringModelManagementService
]

instance WebDashboardApp : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Web‑based dashboard for visualizing measured vs. simulated data."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

// C6: Services
instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time identification of static, kinetic and viscous friction parameters for the gearbox."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParameterInsight
]

instance ParameterExtractionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Extraction of identified friction parameters for model‑based motion control."
    DTDFVocab:provides ExtractFrictionParametersAction
]

instance ModelUpdateService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous updating of the digital twin model based on new sensor data."
    DTDFVocab:provides UpdateControlAlgorithmAction
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visualization of measured versus simulated torque and velocity curves on the dashboard."
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizeComparisonAction
]

instance EngineeringModelManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for managing engineering models within the SysML modeling tool."
]

// C17: Insights / Actions
instance FrictionParameterInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identified static, kinetic and viscous friction coefficients used to improve motion accuracy."
]

instance ExtractFrictionParametersAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Derive friction parameters from identified model deviations for controller use."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance UpdateControlAlgorithmAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Update robot controller with newly identified friction parameters to enhance motion accuracy."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance VisualizeComparisonAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Display measured and simulated torque/velocity data side‑by‑side on the web dashboard."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// Supporting service for MQTT streaming (not listed in characteristics but required for data flow)
instance LiveDataStreamingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Live streaming of sensor data from the robot to the digital twin via MQTT."
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizeComparisonAction
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The digital shadow operates in real‑time, continuously ingesting live sensor streams and updating DataTraces on‑the‑fly to support online friction identification. Although exact sampling rates are not specified, the architecture is described as a 'real‑time, data‑driven' representation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A one‑way architecture where the physical robot (PT) feeds sensor streams to a processing component that consumes the data, runs Simulink friction models, and produces simulated data traces; the resulting digital shadow aggregates measured and simulated traces and is displayed in a unified dashboard."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital‑shadow is employed during the operational (run‑time) stage of the robot to continuously identify friction and adjust control parameters."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Full traceability from each DataTrace to its originating sensor and processing component; comparison of simulated friction‑free and friction‑included models against measured torque/velocity to validate model accuracy; continuous re‑identification to account for wear, temperature, and load variations."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Sensor streams are transmitted over MQTT; the Asset Administration Shell provides meta‑information linking data traces to the underlying models."
]
